prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约3767名→4085名→3200名→3330名→2866名，整体呈波动中前移趋势；2025年位次2866为近5年最佳，较2024年前移约464名，显示报考 热度持续上升；该校在甘肃省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年82人、2022年82人、2023年84人、2024年87人、2025年87人；2026年计划大幅扩招至123人，较2025 年增加36人（增幅约41.4%），扩招幅度显著，将有效缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第36–37名 （2026年第37名），位居全国前列，属顶尖211层次，办学实力和声誉持续稳固；2025年高考周期声誉评价为偏正面：投档线稳步提升（211中排名升至第3）、 入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率提升至27%；2026年周期出现实验室安全事故相关负面舆情，但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第61位（评价为一般），未出现明显热度异常。
5 .【优势学科】第五轮学科评估A-及以上共7个：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、信息与通信工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、软件工程A-；航空航天 类、电子信息类、计算机类等招生专业均对应优势学科，学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；航空航天相关专业 受益于国家战略产业需求，报考热度维持高位；甘肃省物理类考生数从2025年约121443人增至2026年估算约145654人（增幅约20%），竞争加剧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏省南京市，对甘肃考生属跨省报考；该校在甘肃招生计划占比较小（2025年87人），扩招至123人后占比有所提升，但整体仍 属外省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次前移至2866名的强劲走势、2026年招生计划大幅扩招41.4%的利好、本省考生总数增长约20%带来的竞争加剧、 以及学校声誉和专业热度的正向支撑，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约3496名，区间2996–3996名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类（长空创新班）
- 航空航天类（飞行器设计与工程等）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电子信息类
- 信息安全。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 微电子科学与工程（集成电路设计）
- 能源与动力工程
- 探测制导与控制技术
- 机械工程
- 无人驾驶航空器系统工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 低空技术与工程
- 材料科学与工程
- 核工程类
- 交通运输（含空管、运输、电气、机场4个方向）
- 土木工程
- 应用统计学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3496名，区间2996–3996名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业为主力填报（自动化、电气、机械、能源动力等），一档专业（航空航天类长空创新班、计算机、电子 信息）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（2996名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（3996名附近）建议以三档专业保底，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 3767 → 4085 → 3200 → 3330 → 2866, showing a fluctuating but overall forward trend; the 2025 ranking of 2866 is the best in the past five years, moving forward by about 464 places compared to 2024, indicating a continuous rise in application popularity; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Gansu Province: 82 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 87 in 2024, 87 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 123, an increase of 36 (approximately 41.4%) over 2025, which will effectively alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 36–37 in recent years (37th in 2026), ranking among the top nationally, belonging to the top-tier 211 level, with solid strength and reputation; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat positive: the admission score line steadily improved (ranking rose to 3rd among 211 universities), selected for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and the graduate school recommendation rate increased to 27%; in the 2026 cycle, negative public opinion related to a laboratory safety accident emerged, but the overall impact was limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (rated as average), with no obvious abnormal popularity.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-; enrollment majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, and Computer Science all correspond to advantageous disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; aerospace-related majors benefit from national strategic industry demand, maintaining high application popularity; the number of physics category examinees in Gansu Province increased from approximately 121,443 in 2025 to an estimated 145,654 in 2026 (an increase of about 20%), intensifying competition; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, which is an inter-provincial application for Gansu examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu accounts for a small proportion (87 in 2025), and after expansion to 123, the proportion increases, but overall it remains an out-of-province enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward trend of the 2025 ranking to 2866, the favorable factor of a significant 41.4% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, the intensified competition due to an approximately 20% increase in the number of local examinees, and the positive support from the university's reputation and major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025 but to a limited extent; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3496, with a range of 2996–3996.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Aerospace (Changkong Innovation Class)
- Aerospace (Aircraft Design and Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information
- Information Security.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Integrated Circuit Design)
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Detection, Guidance and Control Technology
- Mechanical Engineering
- Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Systems Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Nuclear Engineering
- Transportation (including Air Traffic Control, Transportation, Electrical, and Airport 4 directions)
- Civil Engineering
- Applied Statistics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3496, range 2996–3996. It is recommended that examinees within the range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Automation, Electrical, Mechanical, Energy and Power, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Aerospace Changkong Innovation Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information) as a reach; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2996) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; those with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 3996) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net to ensure admission.
